criteria_results.description: POST /api/auth/register creates an entry in data/users.json with a bcrypt-hashed passwordHash field (starts with '$2b$') and returns HTTP 201 with {id, username}.
criteria_results.evidence: server/routes.ts (lines 18-34) implements the registration logic using bcrypt.hash(password, 10). server/fileStorage.ts (lines 78-89) handles user creation and flushes to data/users.json.

criteria_results.description: GET /api/auth/me returns HTTP 401 with no session cookie, and HTTP 200 with {id, username} after POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials sets a session.
criteria_results.evidence: server/routes.ts (lines 56-61) implements GET /api/auth/me with an isAuthenticated() check. server/auth.ts configures express-session and passport for session management.

criteria_results.description: GET /api/projects as user A does not return user B's project unless B's project has A's userId in its sharedWith array in data/projects.json.
criteria_results.evidence: server/fileStorage.ts (lines 95-99) filters projects in listProjectsForUser based on ownerId or sharedWith array membership.

criteria_results.description: PUT /api/projects/:id writes a valid JSON file to data/project-states/{id}.json containing a 'layers' array key and no 'pdfFile' key.
criteria_results.evidence: shared/schema.ts (lines 24-33) defines projectStateSchema with 'layers' and without 'pdfFile'. server/fileStorage.ts (lines 127-133) writes the state to the data/project-states directory.

criteria_results.description: POST /api/files accepts multipart/form-data with field 'file', saves the binary to data/files/{fileId}, writes metadata JSON to data/files/{fileId}.meta.json, and returns {fileId, url}.
criteria_results.evidence: server/routes.ts (lines 121-127) and server/fileStorage.ts (lines 136-150) implement binary file saving and metadata JSON generation.

criteria_results.description: client/src/App.tsx renders AuthPage when useCurrentUser() returns null and renders the editor Router when user is non-null.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/App.tsx (lines 33-55) contains the conditional rendering logic based on the user object returned by useCurrentUser().

criteria_results.description: client/src/hooks/useAutoSave.ts exports useAutoSave() that guards on docState.projectId !== null before calling PUT /api/projects/:id, with a debounce delay of 2000ms.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/hooks/useAutoSave.ts (line 11) has the projectId guard and (line 32) uses a 2000ms delay in setTimeout.

criteria_results.description: DocumentState in client/src/lib/types.ts contains projectId: string|null, pdfFileId: string|null, and overlayPdfFileId: string|null fields.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/lib/types.ts (lines 48-50) includes the requested fields with the correct types.

suggestions: Consider implementing a more robust session store than MemoryStore for production use, as MemoryStore will cause all users to be logged out on server restart.
Add a file cleanup mechanism for orphaned files in data/files if projects are deleted without their associated files being fully tracked.
